{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Mist
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Mist]] feeds on those who panic in [[Asphodel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
